description: 收件箱与开放 API Token 功能：支持手动/API 推入、AI 整理、日报生成与卡片化。

userStories.title: Add Inbox object types and ID generators
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want dedicated object types and centralized ID helpers so API token/inbox/report entities use consistent business IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add OBJECT_TYPE entries: API_TOKEN, INBOX, INBOX_REPORT in apps/server/src/models/constant/type.ts
Add generateApiTokenId(), generateInboxId(), generateInboxReportId() in apps/server/src/utils/id.ts based on generateTypeId
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create api_token schema and indexes
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want an api_token table so users can create and revoke API credentials safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add apps/server/src/db/schema/api-token.ts with fields token_id, uid, name, token_hash, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at
Ensure token_id is unique and add indexes for uid and token_hash
Export api_token schema from apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create inbox schema and indexes
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want an inbox table so users can store captured content with read state and source metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Add apps/server/src/db/schema/inbox.ts with business field inbox_id and content fields front/back/source/category/is_read
Ensure source default manual, category default backend, and soft-delete field deleted_at
Add indexes for inbox_id(unique), uid, category, is_read
Export inbox schema from apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create inbox_report schema with summary memory
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want inbox reports to store both markdown content and structured summary for later AI retrieval.
acceptanceCriteria: Add apps/server/src/db/schema/inbox-report.ts with fields inbox_report_id, date, content, summary, deleted_at
Add unique constraint on uid+date to prevent duplicate daily reports
Add indexes for inbox_report_id(unique), uid, date
Export inbox_report schema from apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generate migration for inbox and token tables
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want deterministic migration artifacts so new tables and indexes can be applied safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server build before migration generation
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate:generate and produce migration SQL for api_token/inbox/inbox_report
Migration includes uid+date unique constraint for inbox_report and required indexes
Drizzle meta files are updated consistently
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add DTO contracts for token inbox report and card conversion
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I want typed DTO contracts so backend and frontend use the same API payload shape.
acceptanceCriteria: Add DTO files for API token, inbox, inbox report, and inbox-to-card in packages/dto/src
Define enums and response DTOs including AiOrganizeResponse fields optimizedFront optimizedBack reason confidence fallback
Export all new DTOs from packages/dto/src/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build DTO package and align consumers
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want dto build output refreshed so server and web can compile against new inbox/token contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/dto build successfully
Server and web imports resolve new DTO exports without missing-symbol errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement API token service core logic
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want token create/list/delete logic so users can manage API tokens with secure storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement token creation that returns plaintext token once and stores only SHA256 hash
Implement list and delete operations scoped by uid with soft-delete semantics
Use generateApiTokenId for token business ID generation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement ApiTokenAuth middleware and precedence
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want bearer token authentication integrated so API clients can access protected APIs without JWT cookies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ApiTokenAuthMiddleware to parse Authorization Bearer token and validate token hash
Set authenticated user identity on request context after token validation
Authentication chain enforces precedence Token > JWT when both credentials are present
Invalid token returns explicit 401 response
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose API token management endpoints
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to create view and delete my API tokens from dedicated endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/v1/api-tokens, POST /api/v1/api-tokens, DELETE /api/v1/api-tokens/:tokenId
DELETE endpoint uses tokenId business ID (not numeric auto-increment id)
Token management endpoints require JWT auth and reject token-auth self-management
Create response returns plaintext token only at creation time
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement inbox CRUD and read-state service
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want inbox business logic so users can create edit read and soft-delete inbox items.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement create/list/update/delete with uid scoping and deleted_at filtering
List supports pagination and filters for category and isRead
Implement mark-read and read-all with updatedCount response for read-all
Use generateInboxId for inbox business IDs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose inbox CRUD and read-state endpoints
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want REST endpoints for inbox operations so the web app and API clients can manage captured content.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement routes: GET/POST /api/v1/inbox, PUT/DELETE /api/v1/inbox/:inboxId, POST /api/v1/inbox/:inboxId/read, POST /api/v1/inbox/read-all
Request and query payloads are validated with DTOs
Not-found and validation failures return consistent 4xx codes
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build AI organize context retrieval pipeline
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want organized context assembly so AI can rewrite inbox content using relevant short and mid-term memory.
acceptanceCriteria: Context assembly includes L0 current inbox item, L1 related inbox items from last 7 days (top 10), and L2 30-day report summaries
When context exceeds token budget, trim by similarity then recency then diversity
Prompt input payload follows PRD task/currentInput/retrievedContext/constraints structure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement AI organize execution validation and fallback
userStories.description: As an end user, I want reliable AI organize results so failures do not block inbox editing and output format remains machine-readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Call model with organize-specific parameters and timeout policy from PRD
Validate AI output schema includes optimizedFront optimizedBack reason confidence
On timeout or parse failure return original front/back with fallback=true
Record failure reason for observability
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement inbox report CRUD and idempotent generate
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want daily report APIs so users can list view and generate one report per day.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/v1/inbox/reports and GET /api/v1/inbox/reports/:reportId
Implement POST /api/v1/inbox/reports/generate using user timezone day window
Duplicate generate request for same uid+date returns 409 with existing report reference
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement report AI pipeline with 30-day memory and evidence
userStories.description: As a user, I want report insights grounded in recent history so suggestions are relevant and traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Report generation uses daily facts plus 30-day summary memory including weekly aggregates
Persist both markdown report content and summary JSON fields topics mistakes actions
Key insights in generated report include evidenceIds references
Repeat suggestions against last 7 days are replaced by alternative suggestions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement inbox-to-card manual conversion
userStories.description: As a user, I want to convert an inbox item into a card using selected deck and note type.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement POST /api/v1/inbox/:inboxId/to-card with deckId and notetypeId path
Validate selected deck/notetype ownership and required field mapping before creation
Create note and card entities and return noteId cardId deckId notetypeId
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement AI-assisted inbox-to-card recommendation
userStories.description: As a user, I want optional AI deck/notetype recommendation so I can convert inbox content quickly without manual configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: When deckId/notetypeId is absent, choose target deck/notetype based on AI analysis and user preference memory
If AI recommendation fails, fallback to deterministic default mapping path
Response includes aiRecommended flag and chosen deck/notetype info
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add async queue jobs for AI-heavy inbox tasks
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want queued execution for expensive AI jobs so retries and timeout policies are centrally managed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add queue definitions for generate_report organize_inbox and to_card_ai jobs
Configure retry and timeout values matching PRD task schedule table
Expose service hooks to run sync fast path or enqueue async path
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add scheduled jobs for weekly summary and cleanup
userStories.description: As an operator, I want scheduled maintenance so AI memory stays fresh and deleted data does not accumulate indefinitely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add weekly-summary-aggregation cron at 0 2 * * 0
Add cleanup-deleted-records cron at 0 3 * * * for records soft-deleted over 30 days
Scheduled jobs are idempotent and uid-safe
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add metrics and structured logs for inbox AI flows
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want observable metrics and logs so token auth AI calls and report generation health can be monitored.
acceptanceCriteria: Emit metrics for success rate and latency aligned with PRD 10.6 indicator names
Use @echoe/logger for all new logs and avoid console logging
Track AI fallback count and report generation conflicts as measurable events
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add web API clients for token inbox and report endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want typed API modules so pages can consume inbox/token/report features consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add typed API functions in apps/web/src/api for token, inbox, report, organize, and to-card endpoints
Use shared DTO contracts from @echoe/dto for request and response typing
Handle 409 daily-report conflict and 503 AI unavailable responses explicitly in API layer
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement settings API token management UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a settings page for token management so I can create view and revoke API tokens safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /settings/api-tokens page with token list, create, and delete actions
Show plaintext token only once immediately after creation with clear copy affordance
Register page-level service once and consume in child components via Domain pattern
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement inbox page UI with AI actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want an inbox page where I can manage captures and trigger AI organize or card conversion actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /inbox page with list add edit delete mark-read read-all
Support filters for category/isRead and paginated list loading
Expose organize and to-card actions with success and error feedback
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement inbox reports UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want report pages to generate browse and inspect daily inbox reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /inbox/reports list and detail page rendering markdown report content
Implement generate button flow with explicit handling of 409 already-generated response
Display report summary fields topics mistakes actions in detail view
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend tests for token inbox and AI reliability
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want test coverage on critical flows so auth behavior and AI fallback logic remain stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update tests covering token precedence over JWT, inbox CRUD filters, organize fallback, and report generate idempotency
Keep tests scoped by uid to prevent cross-tenant behavior regressions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add frontend tests and run full quality gates
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want frontend validation and global quality checks so inbox and token features are safe to ship.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update frontend tests for token page workflows, inbox actions, and report generation interactions
Run project quality checks for changed packages with no new failures
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
